testsuite.name: Provider codes management in ReserveHub
testsuite.system-out: Scenario Outline: Generate a provider code successfully ?[90m# src/test/resources/features/providerCode.feature:12?[0m ?[32mWhen ?[0m?[32mthe admin logs in with ?[0m?[32m?[1m"juan.admin@correo.com"?[0m?[32m and ?[0m?[32m?[1m"password"?[0m ?[90m# co.com.udea.reservehub.reservehub.stepdefinitions.ProviderCodeStepDefinition.the_admin_logs_in_with_and(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)?[0m ?[32mAnd ?[0m?[32mthe admin generates a provider code?[0m ?[90m# co.com.udea.reservehub.reservehub.stepdefinitions.ProviderCodeStepDefinition.the_admin_generates_a_provider_code()?[0m ?[32mThen ?[0m?[32mthe response status should be ?[0m?[32m?[1m200?[0m ?[90m# co.com.udea.reservehub.reservehub.stepdefinitions.ProviderCodeStepDefinition.the_response_status_should_be(java.lang.Integer)?[0m ?[32mAnd ?[0m?[32mthe response contains a code value starting with ?[0m?[32m?[1m"PROV-"?[0m ?[90m# co.com.udea.reservehub.reservehub.stepdefinitions.ProviderCodeStepDefinition.the_response_contains_a_code_value_starting_with(java.lang.String)?[0m ?[32mAnd ?[0m?[32mthe response indicates the code is active and not used?[0m ?[90m# co.com.udea.reservehub.reservehub.stepdefinitions.ProviderCodeStepDefinition.the_response_indicates_the_code_is_active_and_not_used()?[0m
